caption: A woman wearing a green short-sleeved dress with a white embroidered neckline stands against a rustic background consisting of a weathered grey wall and a fence made of vertical wooden poles. She expresses deep emotion through her facial expressions and hand gestures, moving her hands in the air as she speaks. On-screen subtitles appear at the bottom of the scene. In the first three frames, the text reads, "I find myself to be abandoned, as if in a grave, but I am not buried." In the final frame, the text changes to "It is true." As the sequence progresses, the woman's hand positions shift from being raised near her face to extending outwards to her sides, while her gaze remains focused forward with a solemn expression. The background and her clothing remain constant throughout the clip.
